videos.headline: Cale Hellums runs in a 31-yard TD for Army
videos.description: Cale Hellums gets loose and takes off into the end zone putting Army on the board.

videos.headline: Cale Hellums gets 2nd TD, throws for 2-pt conversion for Army
videos.description: Cale Hellums runs in the touchdown then connects with Tex Brannan for the 2-point conversion to give Army the lead.
